Previous analysis (scripts 09/10/14) found MOVZ instructions matching game opcodes,
but these were **FALSE POSITIVES** in OpenSSL/libcurl code statically linked in libgame.so.
Evidence: strings like 'ssl/ssl_lib.c', 'NTLM', 'Digest', 'Basic', 'Bearer' near the references.

This script uses better approaches to find the REAL game handlers.
